title: Grip Strength as a Clinical Trial Endpoint

seo.title: Grip Strength for Clinical Trials - Pharma & CROs | Able Care
seo.description: Objective, remote-capable functional health measurement for clinical trials and CRO-led studies. Grip strength as a decentralised endpoint for GLP-1 monitoring and oncology.

blocks.headline: Decentralised functional endpoints for clinical trials.
blocks.subtitle: Objective, remote-capable grip strength and functional health measurement for trials and CRO-led studies. Strong signal for GLP-1 muscle loss monitoring and oncology endpoints.

metrics.name: Grip strength
metrics.description: The primary endpoint for muscle function in GLP-1 trials, sarcopenia studies and oncology rehabilitation. Objective, digital, remote-capable.

metrics.name: Sit-to-stand
metrics.description: Lower-limb power and functional capacity. A validated secondary endpoint for frailty and rehabilitation trials.

metrics.name: Gait speed
metrics.description: Functional mobility endpoint linked to disability, hospitalisation and mortality across multiple therapeutic areas.

metrics.name: Timed Up and Go
metrics.description: Composite mobility and balance endpoint. Validated in geriatric, neurological and orthopaedic trial populations.

blocks.heading: How it works in clinical trials

steps.title: Protocol design
steps.description: Work with the Able Care research team to define endpoint capture protocols. Standardised across all trial sites from day one.

steps.title: Site deployment
steps.description: Ship GripAble sensors to trial sites or directly to participants for decentralised capture. Minimal site training required.

steps.title: Remote capture
steps.description: Participants complete assessments at home or at site. Data captured digitally, timestamped, and uploaded automatically.

steps.title: Data delivery
steps.description: Clean, structured endpoint data delivered in your preferred format. Ready for statistical analysis with full audit trail.

pulledStat.text: Grip strength predicts all-cause mortality more reliably than systolic blood pressure.

studies.title: Grip strength as a surrogate marker for GLP-1 related muscle loss
Sarcopenia and grip strength in oncology patients: a systematic review
Digital grip dynamometry for remote functional assessment in clinical trials

blocks.heading: Talk to the research team about your trial.
blocks.body: We can discuss endpoint design, site deployment and data delivery for your specific protocol.
